signup.heading: Create account
signup.name: Name
signup.agreePrefix: By signing up you agree to the

items.a: Telemaster is an operations platform for Telegram groups, channels, and bots—helping you automate and review your work with a smaller team.
Create an account, then follow the in-app steps to authorize and configure—then you can manage groups/channels and enable automation (per plan and availability).

items.q: Do you support multiple accounts or workspaces?
items.a: Yes. You can manage multiple groups/channels and related settings per workspace (per plan and availability).
Use the Contact page to email or submit a request—we’ll get back to you as soon as we can.

tutorialsIndex.heading: Tutorials
tutorialsIndex.lead: Practical guides and best practices to get more out of Telemaster for Telegram.
